subject: O-1 Sprint 2 accessibility dispatch — A11Y-G01 closed + 5 majors
summary: Closes the last open critical (A11Y-G01: SVG keyboard navigation on /graph/). All 44 nodes (40 person/contractor/agent + 4 team) receive tabindex, role=button, aria-label; keydown Enter/Space; aria-live announce region; skip-graph bypass link. Closes 5 additional majors: A11Y-C02 (per-page ochre link color sweep on all 9 audited pages), table scope attributes on careers + mcp, --ink-mute-aa deployed to muted label selectors globally, target-size 2.5.5 AAA utility shipped, canonical site-nav rolled out to graph/index.html + graph/mcp.html. 2.4.9 link purpose audit ran across all 9 audited pages — no vague link text found; closed-by-audit. Sprint 2 running totals: 0 criticals open (was 1), 6 majors open (was 11). All changes structural-verified in source.

gaps_closed.description: SVG keyboard navigation — tabindex, role=button, aria-label on all 44 nodes (40 person/contractor/agent in layer-nodes + 4 team in layer-teams); keydown Enter/Space; role=application on SVG; aria-live announce region; skip-graph bypass link; dashed ochre-link focus ring
Per-page inline a{color:var(--ochre)} replaced with var(--ochre-link) in graph/index.html, graph/mcp.html, accessibility/index.html — all 9 audited pages now use AAA-passing #7a3d0a
Table th scope=col added to all <th> elements in careers/index.html (7 headers) and graph/mcp.html (15 headers across 5 tables)
Target size: .target-aaa utility class (44x44 min) + scoped rules for .btn, .cta, .filter-btn in assets/styles.css
Canonical .site-nav rolled out to graph/index.html + graph/mcp.html with aria-current=page on graph link; ochre-link fix for sn-col-head contrast in all site-nav instances

audits.finding: Broadened grep across all 9 audited pages for here, this, click, more, details, see, view, bare arrow symbols (→, ↗). No vague link text found. All arrow-decorated CTAs include descriptive preceding text (e.g. 'See open roles →', 'Open the Console →'). Arrow spans are decorative within purposeful labels.
